prompt: Convert markdown with YAML front matter to .docx with report style, including header/footer/TOC

assertions.name: core_properties_title
assertions.description: title core property matches front matter

assertions.name: core_properties_author
assertions.description: author core property matches front matter

assertions.name: toc_field_present
assertions.description: TOC field code is present in document

assertions.name: lists_rendered
assertions.description: Bullet and numbered lists are present
